packageRules.description: GitHub Actions — group all non-major bumps into one weekly PR. Renovate keeps the SHA pin + '# vX.Y.Z' trailer comment via helpers:pinGitHubActionDigestsToSemver.
GitHub Actions major bumps stay individual — breaking changes need judgment.
Go modules — group minor + patch. mcp-go, testify, transitive deps land in one PR.
Go module major bumps individual — e.g. mcp-go v0.x → v1.x needs migration.
Indirect gomod deps still get bumped — Go's transitive graph is part of the supply chain.
Gremlins CI-installed tool — keep on the github-actions cadence + labels since the version lives in workflow files.

balena CLI drift watcher — surface each new balena-cli release as its OWN PR (never grouped) so it can be reviewed for parameter drift before merging. chore(deps) so it never triggers a release-please version bump; this only moves the tracking marker in .balena-cli-version.

customManagers.description: Track GREMLINS_VERSION env var in the mutation testing workflows. gremlins is installed at CI runtime via `go install`, so it's neither in go.mod (gomod manager skips it) nor a GitHub Action uses: line (github-actions manager skips it). The regex below picks the literal `GREMLINS_VERSION: vX.Y.Z` line and Renovate cross-references it against go-gremlins/gremlins's GitHub releases.

Track BALENA_CLI_VERSION in .balena-cli-version. balena-cli is shelled out at runtime, so it is invisible to the gomod and github-actions managers; this regex picks the literal `BALENA_CLI_VERSION=X.Y.Z` line and Renovate cross-references it against the balena-cli npm package, opening a PR (with the upstream changelog) on each new release to review for parameter drift.
